# CivilizationControl

> LLM-facing map for the current repo truth. `.github/copilot-instructions.md` is the canonical repo-wide guidance file.

Important notes:

- Direct-chain discovery and write eligibility remain authoritative.
- EF-Map/shared-backend data is additive enrichment only.
- CivilizationControl owns its sponsor worker in-repo; production sponsorship uses `civilizationcontrol-sponsor`.
- `WORLD_RUNTIME_PACKAGE_ID` and `WORLD_ORIGINAL_PACKAGE_ID` are intentionally distinct.
- `VITE_*` values are public browser config, not secrets.

## Start Here

- [Repo-wide instructions](.github/copilot-instructions.md): canonical working rules and deploy/validation policy.
- [Agent quick context](AGENTS.md): short pointer surface for local agents.
- [Documentation index](docs/README.md): canonical docs map.
- [LLM reference guide](docs/llm-reference-guide.md): deep current-state briefing for fresh sessions.
- [Decision log](docs/decision-log.md): newest-first operational truth.

## Live Operations

- [Sponsor worker runbook](docs/operations/sponsor-worker-runbook.md): live sponsorship topology, validation, and secret boundary.
- [Shared-backend assembly enrichment](docs/operations/shared-backend-assembly-enrichment-20260429.md): additive EF-Map contract and fallback rules.
- [World runtime/original split](docs/operations/world-runtime-original-split-20260429.md): runtime versus type-origin package-ID model.
- [MVR world package audit](docs/operations/mvr-world-package-audit-20260429.md): package hygiene and drift automation.

## Design And UX

- [Voice and narrative](docs/strategy/civilization-control/civilizationcontrol-voice-and-narrative.md): player-facing language canon.
- [Emotional objective](docs/strategy/civilization-control/civilizationcontrol-hackathon-emotional-objective.md): calm-authority design target.
- [SVG topology spec](docs/ux/svg-topology-layer-spec.md): topology, state, and semantic color rules.

## Deep References

- [World auth model](docs/architecture/world-contracts-auth-model.md): capability and auth reference.
- [PTB pattern library](docs/ptb/README.md): patterns that require revalidation against current world-contracts.
- [Security guidelines](.github/security-guidelines.md): deep security reference.
